title: Architectural Movements
editorialSummary: Architecture movements grouped by era and aesthetic: Baroque/Rococo, Neoclassical, Art Nouveau/Art Deco, Modernist. False trail: Bauhaus is Modernist not Art Deco despite shared geometric aesthetics; Rococo could be confused with Baroque (it is its ornate sub-style).

meta.gptRationale: Famous buildings help, but mapping them accurately to architectural movements requires solid art-history knowledge and tolerating mixed labels.
